idea-plugin.name: Darculight Theme
idea-plugin.description:
A light theme with warm, readable colours — a hybrid of Darcula and light IDE themes. Includes three variants:
  • Darculight — clean white background with orange accent
  • Darculight Contrast — white background with higher contrast dark-red accent
  • Darculight Sunshine — warm cream background with high contrast accents
Each UI theme bundles its matching editor colour scheme, and all three colour schemes are also available independently under Settings → Editor → Colour Scheme.
